meaning: n.小玻璃管,透明小容器,试管
examples: Unlock the cell holder and remove the cuvette.
There may be a hemoglobin measurement mechanism or card with a cuvette .
Place the capped cuvette in the holder and push the black lever down to lock it.
To make a memory from the protein, Dr Birge suspends elements made from it in a transparent plastic cube known as a cuvette.
